sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_REALTIME_NOTIFICATION (NOTISEQ, USERID, MAINTYPE, SUBTYPE, NOTICONTENT, SENDERID, SENDERNAME, REGDATE, ETCDATA, LINKURL, LINKURL_MOBILE, VIEWTYPE, VIEWWIDTH, VIEWHEIGHT, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID) VALUES ((SELECT NVL(MAX(NOTISEQ) + 1, 1) FROM TBL_REALTIME_NOTIFICATION), #recipientId#, #mainType#, #subType#, #notiContent#, #senderId#, #senderName#, TO_DATE(#regDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), #etcData#, #linkUrl#, #linkUrlMobile#, #viewType#, #viewWidth#, #viewHeight#, #tenantId#, #companyId#)
sqlMap.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_REALTIME_NOTIFICATION WHERE USERID = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANYID = #companyId# AND ISDELETE = 'N'
AND ISREAD = 'N'

SELECT * FROM (SELECT A.*, ROWNUM AS RNUM FROM ( SELECT NOTISEQ AS notiSeq, USERID AS userId, MAINTYPE AS mainType, SUBTYPE AS subType, NOTICONTENT AS notiContent, SENDERID AS senderId, SENDERNAME AS senderName, REGDATE + #offSet# / (24 * 60) AS regDate, ISREAD AS isRead, CASE WHEN READDATE IS NULL THEN READDATE ELSE READDATE + #offSet# / (24 * 60) END AS readDate, ETCDATA AS etcData, ISDELETE AS isDelete, DELETEDATE AS deleteDate, LINKURL AS linkUrl, LINKURL_MOBILE AS linkUrlMobile, VIEWTYPE AS viewType, VIEWWIDTH AS viewWidth, VIEWHEIGHT AS viewHeight, TENANT_ID AS tenantId, COMPANYID AS companyId FROM TBL_REALTIME_NOTIFICATION WHERE USERID = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANYID = #companyId# AND ISDELETE = 'N' ORDER BY REGDATE DESC ) A
WHERE ROWNUM <= #limit# + #rowCount# ) WHERE RNUM >= #limit# + 1
sqlMap.update:
UPDATE TBL_REALTIME_NOTIFICATION SET
ISREAD = 'Y', READDATE = TO_DATE(#processDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
ISDELETE = 'Y', DELETEDATE = TO_DATE(#processDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
WHERE NOTISEQ = #notiSeq# AND COMPANYID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

UPDATE TBL_REALTIME_NOTIFICATION SET
ISREAD = 'Y', READDATE = TO_DATE(#processDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
ISDELETE = 'Y', DELETEDATE = TO_DATE(#processDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
WHERE USERID = #userId#
AND ISREAD = 'Y'
AND COMPANYID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT * FROM TBL_REALTIME_NOTIFICATION WHERE USERID = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANYID = #companyId# AND ISDELETE = 'N'
AND
REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(NOTICONTENT, '&', '&'), '<', '<'), '>', '>'), '''', '''), '\"' ,'"') LIKE '%' || #keyWord# || '%'
AND MAINTYPE IN
#notiFilterList[]#
AND MAINTYPE IN ('')
AND ISREAD = #isRead#
) A
WHERE ISREAD = 'N'

SELECT * FROM (SELECT A.*, ROWNUM AS RNUM FROM (SELECT NOTISEQ AS notiSeq, USERID AS userId, MAINTYPE AS mainType, SUBTYPE AS subType, NOTICONTENT AS notiContent, SENDERID AS senderId, SENDERNAME AS senderName, REGDATE + #offSet# / (24 * 60) AS regDate, ISREAD AS isRead, CASE WHEN READDATE IS NULL THEN READDATE ELSE READDATE + #offSet# / (24 * 60) END AS readDate, ETCDATA AS etcData, ISDELETE AS isDelete, DELETEDATE AS deleteDate, LINKURL AS linkUrl, LINKURL_MOBILE AS linkUrlMobile, VIEWTYPE AS viewType, VIEWWIDTH AS viewWidth, VIEWHEIGHT AS viewHeight, TENANT_ID AS tenantId, COMPANYID AS companyId FROM TBL_REALTIME_NOTIFICATION WHERE USERID = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANYID = #companyId# AND ISDELETE = 'N'
AND
REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(NOTICONTENT, '&', '&'), '<', '<'), '>', '>'), '''', '''), '\"' ,'"') LIKE '%' || #keyWord# || '%'
AND MAINTYPE IN
#notiFilterList[]#
AND MAINTYPE IN ('')
AND ISREAD = #isRead#
ORDER BY REGDATE DESC ) A
WHERE ROWNUM <= #limit# + #rowCount# ) WHERE RNUM >= #limit# + 1

SELECT * FROM (SELECT NOTISEQ AS notiSeq, USERID AS userId, MAINTYPE AS mainType, SUBTYPE AS subType, NOTICONTENT AS notiContent, SENDERID AS senderId, SENDERNAME AS senderName, REGDATE + #offSet# / (24 * 60) AS regDate, ISREAD AS isRead, CASE WHEN READDATE IS NULL THEN READDATE ELSE READDATE + #offSet# / (24 * 60) END AS readDate, ETCDATA AS etcData, ISDELETE AS isDelete, DELETEDATE AS deleteDate, LINKURL AS linkUrl, LINKURL_MOBILE AS linkUrlMobile, VIEWTYPE AS viewType, VIEWWIDTH AS viewWidth, VIEWHEIGHT AS viewHeight, TENANT_ID AS tenantId, COMPANYID AS companyId FROM TBL_REALTIME_NOTIFICATION WHERE USERID = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANYID = #companyId# AND ISDELETE = 'N'
AND
REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(NOTICONTENT, '&', '&'), '<', '<'), '>', '>'), '''', '''), '\"' ,'"') LIKE '%' || #keyWord# || '%'
AND MAINTYPE IN
#notiFilterList[]#
AND MAINTYPE IN ('')
AND ISREAD = #isRead#
AND notiseq < #lastNotiSeq#
ORDER BY REGDATE DESC, notiseq desc )
WHERE ROWNUM <= #rowCount#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_TENANT_CONFIG SET PROPERTY_VALUE=#storagePeriod# WHERE PROPERTY_NAME='notiStoragePeriod' AND TENANT_ID=#tenantId#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_REALTIME_NOTIFICATION WHERE (TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offSet# / (24 * 60)) - (TO_DATE(REGDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offSet# / (24 * 60)) > #notiStoragePeriod# AND TENANT_ID=#tenantId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_REALTIME_NOTIFICATION WHERE USERID = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANYID = #companyId# AND REGDATE > TO_DATE(#pollStime#,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') and REGDATE <= TO_DATE(#pollEtime#,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')

SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM TBL_PORTAL_MENU TPM INNER JOIN TBL_PORTAL_MENU_COMP TPMC ON TPM.MENU_ID = TPMC.MENU_ID AND TPM.MENUCODE = 'approval' AND TPMC.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TPMC.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND TPM.MENU_URL = '/ezApprovalG/apprGMain.do' AND TPMC.MENU_USED = '1'
